name: Nattokinase
summary: Nattokinase is a fibrinolytic enzyme from natto with limited-to-moderate evidence for blood pressure and coagulation marker effects.
description: Nattokinase is a fibrinolytic enzyme from fermented soybeans that can influence fibrin remodeling and blood coagulation markers in experimental and limited human data.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v9.6: Nattokinase has mechanistic/cardiovascular marker evidence but bleeding-risk context blocks casual monetization.
claimMap.notes: v9.6: Nattokinase has mechanistic/cardiovascular marker evidence but bleeding-risk context blocks casual monetization.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: Nattokinase FU dose varies; product-specific fibrinolytic units must be disclosed
